title: Image Size, Build Performance, Runtime Efficiency, and Reproducibility · Docker Retrieval
summary: An operations reviewer reconstructs image size, build performance, runtime efficiency, and reproducibility from delayed evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and extends the measured build and runtime optimization experiment under a changed constraint. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for measured build and runtime optimization experiment after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evide…
objectives: Measure compressed, unpacked, shared, unique, and writable size and trace which layer, package, or artifact owns the change.
Measure cold, warm, changed-source, changed-lockfile, and remote-cache builds with plain progress and controlled inputs.
Compare trusted base, distroless or scratch, packages, debugging needs, certificates, locales, dynamic libraries, and patch workflow.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# docker-basics cumulative container delivery portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never connect to a Docker daemon, mount a socket, or execute learner commands.
workspace: docker
version-baseline:
  engine: 29.6.1
  compose: 5.3.1
  buildx: 0.35.0
  buildkit: 0.31.1
  dockerfile-frontend: 1.25
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Docker Image Size Layer Analysis · changed case · Review Docker Image Size Layer Analysis
steps.instruction:
review case — A review team compares a warm local build with a cold CI build and blames a large final image, while context transfer and cross-platform cache dominate. Measure each stage and compare controlled output digests. Competency probe: Measure compressed, unpacked, shared, unique, and writable size and trace which layer, package, or artifact owns the change.

Which action demonstrates Docker Image Size Layer Analysis without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Docker Image Size Layer Analysis · changed case · Review Docker Image Size Layer Analysis.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for measure compressed, unpacked, shared, unique, and writable size and trace which layer, package, or artifact owns the change. For Docker Image Size Layer Analysis · changed case · Review Docker Image Size Layer Analysis, keep Docker Image Size Layer Analysis connected to mechanically reviewable Docker artifact and transfer evidence.
